fields.name: Journal Template Name
fields.tooltip:
Shows the name of the journal template in which the journal batch is created.
When you create a new journal batch, the program automatically retrieves the name from the Name field in the FA Journal Template table.

fields.name: Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the journal batch you are creating.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies the journal batch that you are creating.

fields.name: Reason Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the reason code, a supplementary source code that enables you to trace the entry.

fields.name: No. Series
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number series from which entry or record numbers are assigned to new entries or records.

fields.name: Posting No. Series
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the number series that will assign document numbers to ledger entries that are posted from this journal batch.

fields.name: Recurring
fields.tooltip:
Indicates whether this is a recurring journal.
The field is a Boolean field. When the value is Yes, the journal is a recurring journal. When the value is No, the journal is not a recurring journal.

fields.name: No. of Lines
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of lines in this journal batch.
